market_pulse: Encore Beach Club and OMNIA Dayclub drive premium daytime momentum; LIV holds strong Friday-Sunday resident rotation; Zouk and Hakkasan competitive across mid-week entertainment; Palm Tree Beach Club newly opened creating daylife competition

content_gaps.description: Competitors deploying limited-time promo codes on TikTok for next-day event bookings; LIV not leveraging flash-sale urgency messaging
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 48-hour TikTok series with flash codes for Friday/Saturday events; focus on limited cabana availability

content_gaps.description: Competitors using high-energy dance floor audio clips (#viral trending sounds); LIV posts leaning toward ambient/brand content

content_gaps.description: Guests posting organic moment videos with #livvegas hashtag but LIV not resharing in Stories; competitors aggressively reposting guest content
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create weekly UGC highlight reel; repost 3-5 best guest moments daily to Stories with sticker callout
